channel.title: fill on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in fill on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: Shake Shack
item.description: I only got a few more NYC eateries to blog about then I’ll be done for now. Shake Shack is basically the west coast’s equivalent to In-N-Out. The one we visited was the original Shake Shack that sits in the middle of some sort of park near Eleven Madison. For a rather chilly day, there was still a long line of people that took approximately 30 minutes for us to get our food.
